Q7 Not checked
General Aptitude • INSTRUMENTATION ENGINEERING • Beginner • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Select the word that is FARTHEST in meaning to the bold word in capital letters.
OBLIGATORY

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
The word "OBLIGATORY" means something that is required or necessary. The opposite of this would be something that is voluntary, meaning done of one's own free will.

Q23 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The type of feedback present in the circuit is:

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Here two type of feedback present. One is provided by RE resistance and other by resistance R.
Feedback by RE resistor is local whereas feedback by resistor R is global. Considering only global feedback.
R is directly connected to output node hence voltage sampling.
R is not directly connected to input node hence series mixing.
∴ Voltage series or series-shunt feedback.
